resources.string: These values are injected into the bundled NovaAdapt realtime console on launch. The shell loads the local operator UI from the repo view bundle and connects to your remote bridge/core stack.
Paste a NovaAdapt pairing link, manifest JSON, or pairing code from your desktop bridge. The app will fill the connection settings and open the operator console for you.
Connected to %1$s. Paste a new pairing manifest any time to repoint this operator shell.
novaadapt://pair?payload=... or paste the raw pairing code
Waiting for a pairing link, pairing code, or manual settings.
Paste a pairing link, JSON manifest, or pairing code first.
Clipboard does not contain pairing text.
Nearby bridge found at %1$s. Scan the QR or paste the pairing code to finish setup without typing addresses.
Scanning the local network for NovaAdapt bridge…
Found bridge at %1$s. Manual settings were updated with this host.
Found %1$d bridges. Using %2$s as the default host.
No nearby NovaAdapt bridge responded on port 9797.
Scan the NovaAdapt pairing QR from your desktop.
